items.summary: OpenAI now lets Codex users bank their rate-limit resets and trigger them manually instead of watching them expire on a fixed schedule. items.title: Gemma 4 12B: The Developer Guide
items.summary: The newly released Gemma 4 12B is a dense, multimodal model designed for high-performance local AI execution on consumer devices.
